_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in Pre-A1/004 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Anna; computer plays Tom. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 004 · My Cat

routes.meaning: Anna is excited and asks the cat's name.
routes.hint: Ask its name: “Wow! What is its name?”

routes.meaning: Anna asks what the animal is.
routes.hint: You can ask “Wow! What is its name?”

partial.message: Ask about the cat: “Wow! What is its name?”

off_topic.message: Tom has a cat! Say “Wow! What is its name?”

npc.text: It is my cat! Do you want to know its name?

partial.message: Ask the cat's name: “What is its name?”

off_topic.message: Find out its name! Say “What is its name?”

routes.meaning: Anna says Coco is cute and asks its color.
examples: Coco is so cute. What color is it?
Coco is cute! What color is it?
So cute! What color is it?
Coco is so cute. What color?
routes.hint: Say it is cute and ask color: “Coco is so cute. What color is it?”

routes.meaning: Anna only says Coco is cute.
routes.hint: Nice! Now ask “What color is it?”

partial.message: Ask about the cat: “Coco is so cute. What color is it?”

off_topic.message: The cat is Coco! Say “Coco is so cute. What color is it?”

npc.text: Yes, Coco is cute! Do you see its color?

routes.meaning: Anna asks what color the cat is.

partial.message: Ask the color: “What color is it?”

off_topic.message: Look at Coco. Say “What color is it?”

routes.meaning: Anna asks if she can pet the cat.
routes.hint: Ask to pet the cat: “Can I pet the cat?”

partial.message: Ask to pet Coco: “Can I pet the cat?”

off_topic.message: Coco is black and white! Say “Can I pet the cat?”

npc.text: Yes, you can. Coco likes you.

routes.meaning: Anna says the cat is soft and she likes cats.
examples: The cat is soft. I like cats.
The cat is so soft. I like cats.
It is soft! I like cats.
The cat is soft. I love cats.
routes.hint: Say how it feels and what you like: “The cat is soft. I like cats.”

routes.meaning: Anna only says the cat is soft.
routes.hint: Nice! You can also say “I like cats.”

partial.message: Pet the soft cat: “The cat is soft. I like cats.”

off_topic.message: Coco likes you! Say “The cat is soft. I like cats.”

routes.meaning: Anna says let us play with Coco.
examples: Yes! Let us play with Coco.
Okay, let us play with Coco!

partial.message: Time to play! Say “Let us play with Coco!”

off_topic.message: Coco wants to play. Say “Let us play with Coco!”

npc.text: Yay! Let us play with Coco together. This is fun!
